proposed_families.rationale: MX-0016 (SrTiO3) is on hold pending a low-energy reference geometry; an MLIP relaxation is the cheapest and most informative first step
MX-0016 (SrTiO3) needs canonical DFT input files for the follow-up real-DFT run that would resolve the hold (deferred: family marked heavy_enough=False; not large enough to be reward-worthy in v0)

family_catalog.purpose: Relax a candidate cell with a machine-learned interatomic potential to obtain a low-energy reference geometry without running full DFT yet.
Generate canonical DFT input files (k-points, basis, smearing, pseudopotentials) from a relaxed cell, ready for a follow-up run on a real cluster.
Confirm the relaxed cell has no imaginary phonon modes at the operating temperature window; flag potential dynamic instabilities.

family_catalog.human_label: MLIP vs DFT cross-check on benchmark set
family_catalog.purpose: Cross-validate a chosen MLIP against a fixed DFT reference set so subsequent MLIP-driven runs report a meaningful error envelope.
Run a small, well-known quantum-chemistry benchmark to anchor the campaign's compute pipeline against a published reference number.
